reviews.comment:
Acetable porque se encuentra entre mitad de camino entre las ciudades de Gral Acha y 25 de Mayo en La Pampa. El baño de los hombres tiene servicio de duchas, por si vienen de viaje hacia Bariloche. Es una excelente opción para refrescarse, antes de cruzar la tediosa ruta del desierto.

(Translated by Google)
It's conveniently located halfway between the towns of General Acha and 25 de Mayo in La Pampa province. The men's restroom has showers, which is useful if you're traveling to Bariloche. It's an excellent option for a quick refreshment before tackling the tedious desert route.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNROGF6M3NRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente área de descanso. Vale mucho la pena, parada "casi obligada" camino a Mendoza. Lamentablemente por la doble vía al regreso se complica el acceso. Esta de la banquina en dirección a Mendoza.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent rest area. Well worth it, a "must-see" stop on the way to Mendoza. Unfortunately, access is difficult on the return trip due to the divided highway. This one is on the shoulder heading towards Mendoza.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRb0pHMnlRRRAB
